jsonLd.title: BSE is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at BSE are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About BSE:
BSE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE!
